---
title: "Resume"

about:
  id: Resume-Main
  template: broadside
  image: Headshot1.png
  image-width: 350px
  image-shape: rounded

format:
  html: 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

::: {#Resume-Main}
Hold Text

:::



::: text-center
<a href="Resume_JonathanBarnes.pdf" download class="btn btn-primary"> <i class="bi bi-save"></i> Download Resume </a>
:::
